series.curator_notes: German children's music compilation series. Multiple sub-series including 'Die 60 besten Kinderlieder', 'Unsere schönsten...' theme collections, 'alltourini Kinderhits', and 'Calimigo' branded releases. Covers educational topics (ABC, Einmaleins, English), seasonal themes, bedtime songs, and TV/film music. Primarily song compilations rather than narrative audio dramas.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
